title: Budget Acts of 2023, 2024, and 2025.
summary: An act to amend the Budget Act of 2023 (Chapters 12, 38, and 189 of the Statutes of 2023) by amending Sections 19.564 and 39.10 of that act, to amend the Budget Act of 2024 (Chapters 22, 35, and 994 of the Statutes of 2024) by amending Items 3125-101-6093 and 6100-488 of Section 2.00 of, and amending Section 39.10 of, that act, and to amend the Budget Act of 2025 (Chapters 4 and 5 of the Statutes of 2025) by amending Items 0250-494, 0509-101-0001, 0540-103-0001, 1700-001-0001, 3125-102-6093, 3360-001-3228, 3360-101-3228, 3480-001-0890, 3540-001-0001, 3540-101-0890, 3760-101-0001, 3790-003-6093, 3790-101-0516, 3790-102-6093, 3900-001-0115, 3900-001-3359, 4260-116-3397, 6100-134-0890, 6120-011-0001, 7600-001-0004, 7600-001-3418, 7760-101-0001, and 8570-001-6093 of, adding Items 3100-001-0890, 3540-002-6093, 3560-101-6093, and 6120-217-0001 to, and repealing Items 1700-101-0001, 3540-102-6093, and 3720-101-0001 of, Section 2.00 of, amending Sections 39.00, 39.10, and 99.50 of, and adding Section 15.01 to, that act, relating to the state budget, and making an appropriation therefor, to take effect immediately, budget bill.

actions.action: Read first time. To print.
From printer. May be heard in committee February 8.
Referred to Com. on BUDGET.
Withdrawn from committee.
Ordered to second reading.
(Ayes 53. Noes 17. Page 643.)
Read second time. Ordered to third reading.
Read third time. Passed. Ordered to the Senate. (Ayes 53. Noes 17. Page 716.)
In Senate. Read first time. To Com. on RLS. for assignment.
Referred to Com. on B. & F. R.
In committee: Hearing postponed by committee.
From committee chair, with author's amendments: Amend, and re-refer to committee. Read second time, amended, and re-referred to Com. on B. & F. R.
From committee: Do pass. (Ayes 11. Noes 4.) (February 17).
Read second time. Ordered to third reading.
Read third time. Passed. Ordered to the Assembly. (Ayes 28. Noes 10.).
In Assembly. Concurrence in Senate amendments pending.
Assembly Rule 63 suspended. (Ayes 53. Noes 16.)
Senate amendments concurred in. To Engrossing and Enrolling. (Ayes 64. Noes 3.).
Enrolled and presented to the Governor at 11:30 a.m.
Approved by the Governor.
Chaptered by Secretary of State - Chapter 5, Statutes of 2026.

votes.description: Assembly 3rd Reading AB107 Gabriel By Laird
AB 107 GABRIEL Concurrence in Senate Amendments
